label: content

ocr_findings.json_says: Callout header not present in output entities (correctly suppressed)
ocr_findings.note: OCR misread '試験にはコレが出る！' as '試験にはつしが出る！' — known garbled callout. Stage 4 correctly did not leak it into output. The callout bullet points (著作権法保護対象 / 非保護) are similarly not leaked. This is expected pipeline behavior.

narrative: Page 072 has three accurate term entities (プログラム言語, アルゴリズム, プロトコル) all with JP definitions exactly matching the OCR bullet-list definitions. No phantom content, no garbled characters in output. The misread callout header is correctly suppressed. PASS.
